Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement By Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patricia Walsh, of Leonidou & Rosin PC, Tel. 650.691.2888, for plaintiffs;
Brian M. Junginger, of McInerney & Dillon, Tel. 510.465.7100, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF EDWARD W. SCOTT ELECTRIC CO., INC.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement By Stipulated Judgment is granted. Plaintiff shall prepare an order and revise the judgment. The proposed judgment must clarify that it is only seeking to have judgment entered against Defendant Van Ness Towers, LLC. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
